events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need parse scenario: Structural welding, observed field condition: visible undercut/porosity/incomplete fusion. Work rough-complete. Component condition categories: installed-defective. Need identify component or condition and visible defect cues. Decision fail because non-compliant defects. Risk high? Undercut/porosity/incomplete fusion are weld discontinuities that can reduce strength; incomplete fusion especially critical. In structural welding per AWS D1.1 these are rejectable defects. Risk high or critical? Incomplete fusion is serious; undercut and porosity depending extent. Since visible and at rough-complete, fail. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 70? Value not asked. Sound source etc default empty string/0. Workable empty. Findings list defects. Actions: remove/repair weld, re-inspect, welder requal maybe. References AWS D1.1 clauses for acceptance criteria. Need exact JSON. Ensure valid. No prose outside JSON.
